## Scope

Describe the user-visible or engineering outcome.

## Evidence

- [ ] CPU Python tests pass
- [ ] C++ host tests pass
- [ ] Reproducible command and artifact/model provenance are documented
- [ ] No secrets, raw audio, caches, checkpoints, ONNX, or OM binaries are committed

For frontend, model-contract, decoder, AscendCL, CMake, or CANN changes:

- [ ] Manual Atlas workflow report attached
- [ ] ONNX/OM text parity checked
- [ ] Board metrics are labeled measured, not estimated

## Known limitations

List anything that needs private data, a GPU, or physical Atlas hardware.
